title: rayjacksonia annua
intro: Rayjacksonia annua, also known as Ray's desert parsley, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Rayjacksonia annua can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used for medicinal purposes.
